textByHash.af291012c1e2b0de6f819db4d5982b2928c9545e: I don't want to talk about it!
textByHash.dce97b63e92f2b891daa72e69b527cfa821b9a3d: I said I don't want to talk about it!
textByHash.7cb7c85ceee9da2535d57fcb3674b12b01a6aebc: Now you're talking! An Asgarnian Ale please!
textByHash.22742dd370eb74c3c00fd323629666f26bdd6aea: I honestly don't know! I've looked everywhere. I've searched the castle and my room!
textByHash.2aaba432daf9eb058e1008fa42358cf4ccad31b6: Good. Good. I have some dice. How much do you want to offer?
textByHash.e5fa227935f336313eaa926038a9926751be6dc1: Woah! Do you think I'm made of money? Max bet is 1000 gold.
textByHash.5767ad6970efe0d2e870e32d9866d29f3df1b636: Don't forget that once I start my roll you can't back out of the bet! If you do you lose your stake!
textByHash.292955f858043ba4c5f572fe970a593f79910cab: Sounds good! I normally drink Asgarnian Ale but you know what?
textByHash.0a87786e261164a8646f34176bec048ece234ba6: I really fancy one of those Blurberry Specials. I never get over to the Gnome Stronghold so I haven't had one for ages!
textByHash.8cd6a65fbdb7a94ce78fd11139ef8bb56516dbf1: Eashy tiger! Max bet ish 1000 coinsh.
textByHash.d34410ca8e6bcbb4cd1957a8e8197aaacbe901ee: Oh dear, I seem to have run out of money!
textByHash.d964d72e23e13ccb4c88c4d8ed527a9084c4ebf1: I'll write you out an IOU for the rest.
textByHash.bf090935511e007dc75690a647a2cb76cc6d81d6: Shixteen! How am I shupposhed to beat that!
textByHash.162143336f0e052ead760adcb7bb69aec93f6c09: I didn't know you could ushe four dishe. Oh well.
textByHash.986bd8abe4a141acd446eb01c134421ba053260a: I sheemed to have rolled a one.
textByHash.927f0c4a31dc9d88b6033a688b11833126c5d612: I'm shure I had money, not anymore!
